channel.title: Socketio on Make Things Happen
channel.description: Recent content in Socketio on Make Things Happen

item.title: Let’s hook up Socket.IO with HapiJS in a single code base
item.description: So we wanted to integrate a websockets server within our REST api for which we were using HapiJS. I was previously using Socket.IO solution for websockets and I was very happy with it. So we decided to use it with our REST server in a single codebase.
